name: White Chocolate and Matcha
steps: Infuse water and lesser quality matcha, salt and citric acid for 5 minutes.
Pour over white chocolate and blitz.
When cool fold in semi whipped cream.
Combine and blitz with a hand blender to form bubbles.
Immediately lined plastic box and blast chill.
Keep in the last chiller for service.
Using the Kenwood cream the butter and sugar.
Add the flour and bake in the oven for 15 minutes.
Spread on a Silpat and bake in the oven for 15 minutes at 160 degrees with low humidity and fan.
Roast the white chocolate in the oven at 160 degrees for 12 minutes.
Mix together and add 40 g white chocolate to make the powder ready for service.
